overview: A casual worm breeding game inspired by Clusterduck. Collect up to 20 elemental worms — Electric, Earth, Grass, and Water — each with 3 mix-and-match body parts. Breed two worms to hatch offspring with randomized trait inheritance or rare mutations, and delete worms to make room for new ones.
features: 4 elemental worm types with distinct color themes (Electric, Earth, Grass, Water)
3 mix-and-match body parts per worm (head, body, tail) with visible mutations
Breed any two selected worms to get a new offspring with random trait inheritance
Collection of up to 20 worms with persistent storage
Tap to select, delete button to remove worms
